source.name: shadcn/ui
source.license_notes: Use as a source link and short implementation notes; respect project license and avoid unnecessary bulk copying.

layout_rules: Compose small accessible primitives into product-specific components.
Use restrained surfaces, borders, and typography before adding strong color.
Keep spacing and component rhythm consistent across the page.
accessibility_notes: Prefer accessible primitives for dialogs, menus, popovers, and forms.
Preserve keyboard and focus behavior when restyling.
implementation_hints: Use when generating React/Tailwind interfaces that need modern product polish.
Good default for AI tools, internal tools, and fast SaaS prototypes.
Avoid making every page look like the same generic template; add product-specific visual direction.

quality.notes: Seed record for modern web component composition.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use shadcn/ui-style composition for modern React/Tailwind web apps: accessible primitives, clean neutral surfaces, consistent rhythm, and explicit component states.
